OS: linux/amd64
Daemon version: 0.66.4
CLI version: 0.66.4
Profile: default
Daemon status: NeedsLogin

It seems that no session was found. Please do the SSO login in your browser.
If your browser didn't open automatically, use this URL to log in:

https://auth.example.com/realms/netbird/protocol/openid-connect/auth?client_id=netbird-cli&code_challenge=abcdef&code_challenge_method=S256&redirect_uri=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A53000&response_type=code&scope=openid%20profile%20email%20offline_access
